description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, create new segmentation as "Cranial_Segmentation".

description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Add" botton to add a new segment as "Cranial_Segment".

description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Threshold" botton.

description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, set the Threshold Range including the lowest value and the largest value.

description: In the "Segmentation Editor" module, Click the "Apply" botton.

ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Apply' to run threshold segmentation.

description: In the "Skull Mask" section, choose the segment node.

ui_guidance.instruction: Pick the segment node that represents the skull mask.

ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Add ROI' to create a region of interest.

description: Manually adjust the boundary of the ROI to keep the skull part.

ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the ROI handles to enclose the skull region.

ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the ROI handles to enclose the skull region.

description: In the "Markups" module, click the "Closed Curve" to create a closed curve node.

description: Manually draw the curve on the skull model to include the fractured skull part.

ui_guidance.title: Draw Curve Around Defect
ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the skull model to place points defining the closed curve around the fracture.

ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the skull model to place points defining the closed curve around the fracture.

description: In the "Curve selection" section, choose the Curve node.

ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the curve node from the list.

ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the curve node from the list.
